drills.name: Basic needle driving setup

drills.name: Three-throw knot sequence drill
drills.description: Complete 10 repetitions of the full three-throw extracorporeal knot sequence, focusing on proper hand exchanges and knot pusher control.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, you need to transition from studying technique to executing actual task attempts. Focus on completing full task runs to build muscle memory and timing.
